proposal.working_title: AI Sales Enablement: The 5-System Playbook That Lifts Quota Attainment Without Adding Headcount
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI sales enablement deployments add more dashboards than deals. Here is the operator playbook for the five systems that actually compound rep productivity and quota attainment.
outline_bullets: Why most AI sales enablement deployments produce dashboards instead of deals in the first 90 days
The five systems every operator-grade AI sales enablement stack needs: account intelligence, content surfacing, coaching, forecasting, and revenue attribution
Building the playbook: data plumbing, model selection, change management, and the measurement framework that proves quota attainment moved
